column1: # 1. LinkedIn Sales Navigator: Search "Head of AI" OR "CTO" at companies with 20-500 employees in AI/ML
# 2. Product Hunt: Filter AI launches from last 90 days; find CTO on LinkedIn
# 3. Y Combinator directory: Filter current batch + last 2 batches for AI companies
# 5. GitHub: Repos with "agent" + "production" in README; trace to company
# 6. Conference attendee lists: AI Engineer Summit
# 7. Job boards: Companies hiring "ML Ops" or "AI Platform" = scaling agents
# 10. Personalization: Reference a specific blog post

column6: trigger_signal
column7: personalization_hook

column6: Launched agent orchestration platform on Product Hunt last week
column7: Your PH launch mentioned "production-ready agents" — curious how you're measuring that

column6: Hiring for ML Ops Engineer (LinkedIn job post)
column7: Saw you're hiring ML Ops — usually means agents are scaling fast

column6: Published blog post on agent reliability challenges
column7: Your blog on agent reliability resonated — the monitoring gap you described is exactly what we assess

column6: Just closed Series A ($12M) per TechCrunch
column7: Congrats on the raise — scaling agents post-funding is where maturity gaps usually surface

column6: Agent incident mentioned in their Discord community
column7: Noticed the discussion in your Discord about agent hallucination rates — we help quantify and track that

column7: New FDA AI guidance is going to require maturity evidence — happy to share how teams are preparing

column6: Announced AI-powered routing agents at conference

column6: Board mandate for AI governance per annual report

column6: Client RFP for agent evaluation (job listing for AI assessor)
column7: Saw you're hiring an AI assessor — we have a turnkey assessment framework that might save you the headcount

column6: Shipping 3 agent products simultaneously per changelog

column6: Expanding from single-agent to multi-agent architecture

column6: Transitioning from research to production (blog post)
